title: nervilia stolziana
intro: Nervilia stolziana, also known as the Stolz's Nervilia or the Yellow Nervilia, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and rheumatism, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Nervilia stolziana include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are typically dried and used in traditional medicine, often combined with other plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
